matches_distinct_teams_check.name: matches_distinct_teams_check
matches_distinct_teams_check.value: "matches"."red_team_id" IS NULL OR "matches"."blue_team_id" IS NULL OR "matches"."red_team_id" <> "matches"."blue_team_id"

qualification_results_competitor_check.name: qualification_results_competitor_check
qualification_results_competitor_check.value: ("qualification_results"."user_id" IS NOT NULL) <> ("qualification_results"."team_id" IS NOT NULL)
